title: Radio
description: Foldkit-native Base UI Radio primitive preserving controlled checked and unchecked states, root and indicator data attributes, disabled/read-only/required/invalid states, Space keyup activation, Enter suppression, and native radio form controls without internal state.

deviations.summary: Checked state is controlled by the consuming Foldkit model instead of Base UI group context or hidden native input mutation.
deviations.rationale: Foldkit installable source is stateless and pure. User interaction emits a typed checked-change fact, and the consuming update owns whether the radio is selected.
